title: Device Home Screen - Battery life
scenario: Device Home Screen battery display shows correct icons and color-coded levels for headsets, headsets with case, and earbuds, with greyed-out icons when headset is powered off
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Observe the battery icon(s) displayed for the connected device.
3. If a headset (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) is connected, verify that a single battery icon is shown.
4. If a headset with a charging case (e.g., Poly Voyager 4320) is connected, verify that two battery icons labeled "H" (headset) and "C" (case) are shown.
5. If earbuds (e.g., Poly Free 60+) are connected, verify that three battery icons labeled "L" (left), "R" (right), and "C" (case) are shown.
6. Check battery icon color at various charge levels: 100%–40% should be black (or white in dark mode), 39%–20% should be yellow, 19%–1% should be red, and 0% should be empty.
7. Turn off the headset/earbuds and observe the battery icon(s) on the Home screen.
expected: Battery icons display correctly based on device type: single icon for headsets, two icons (H and C) for headsets with a charging case, three icons (L, R, C) for earbuds. Icon colors match charge level thresholds (black/white, yellow, red, empty). When the headset is turned off, battery icons are greyed out with the last known percentage displayed.
